title: senna crotalarioides
intro: Senna crotalarioides, also known as the Egyptian senna or Alexandrian senna, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a natural laxative with medicinal properties, primarily used for its anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna crotalarioides include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues. Senna crotalarioides can be found in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, often used to support digestive health and maintain regular bowel movements.
